name: inbound-ads
description: Inbound CPH's Google Ads suite: one plugin (15 skills) covering the full client lifecycle, Danish-default, read-only against Google Ads except where a HITL-gated write is explicitly confirmed. BUILD a new campaign: inb-ads-campaign-build (orchestrator — runs the Phase 1->4 pipeline by dispatching a subagent per phase reference, ending in Ian's 10-tab Excel review workbook) plus the phase skills that also run standalone — inb-ads-campaign-research (landing-page + competitor + strategy, .docx solo), inb-ads-campaign-structure (ad-groups + keywords + negatives, .xlsx solo), inb-ads-campaign-assets (sitelinks/callouts/snippets, .xlsx solo), and inb-ads-rsa-copy (the RSA copy engine reused per ad group). OPTIMIZE a live account: inb-ads-search-term-analyse (search-terms analysis to one colour-coded .xlsx, or talk findings through and write agreed negatives/keywords to Editor CSVs — merged from the former soegeterm-analyse + search-term skills), inb-ads-rsa-hygiene (post-launch RSA asset-hygiene, feeds a gap-brief back into inb-ads-rsa-copy), inb-ads-optimization-loop (the whole diagnose-to-workbook loop in one go: search-terms + asset-hygiene + Quality Score -> one editable Excel workbook), and inb-ads-display-placement-audit (scores Display Network placements 0-100 for junk risk — gambling, MFA/clickbait, low-quality apps — via a bundled free blocklist + account signals, capped web lookups only on genuine toss-ups, ranked in-chat report, then writes confirmed negative placements directly via ads-writer). GENERAL deliverables: inb-ads-account-audit (full paid-search audit to an HTML slide deck + PDF), inb-ads-change-log (changelog entry from Google Ads' own change-history), inb-ads-editor-csv-export (convert a confirmed review workbook — from inb-ads-campaign-build OR inb-ads-optimization-loop — into per-entity Google Ads Editor import CSVs), inb-ads-context-publish (publish per-client AI Context Docs to Drive + maintain the master client-index), inb-ads-context-update (on-demand per-client AI-context update + PM overview, all on Drive, HITL-gated diff), and inb-ads-onboarding-analysis (new-client onboarding: the 35-point ClickUp Analysearbejdet account review to a .docx checklist in the client's Drive folder). Human-in-the-loop on every external write (Drive, Editor CSVs, and any confirmed Google Ads write); no skill writes to an account autonomously.

inbound_root_folder_id.title: Inbound CPH Drive folder ID
inbound_root_folder_id.description: The Google Drive folder ID for the inbound-cph/ root folder where all client folders live. Defaults to the shared agency folder. Override only if you have a different mount.
